---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for Melody
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Problem**

The problem or limitation you are running into.

**Proposed solution**

What you would like Melody to do.

**Alternatives considered**

Other approaches you evaluated.

**Additional context**

Anything else that helps (use cases, references, examples).

---

New features target the actively maintained **v3** line only (see
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#versioning-and-where-to-make-changes)).
